label: Sealed Tally Store
description: The Sealed Tally Store serves as the Ledgerbound Exchange’s controlled storage, walled in salvaged ashlar and newer brick and closed behind an iron-banded door with a city-seal hasp. Numbered shelving and tarred pigeon-cubbies hold ledger bundles, wax-stoppered ink, and stamped weight-sets, each space keyed to a posted inventory slate. Rope-slung chests rest on raised planks to keep contents above damp rising from the ruin-laid foundations of Varric Holdfast. Hazard placards and interdiction broadsides are filed in a dedicated rack, preserving official notices as retained evidence of compliance.
